latest_articles.title: French Far Right Falls Short of Statement Win in Yardstick Local Races
latest_articles.summary: France’s far right hoped for major gains in Sunday’s municipal elections, a key bellwether moment before a presidential election next year. Its results were mixed.

latest_articles.title: The Billionaire Funding France’s Far Right
latest_articles.summary: Pierre-Édouard Stérin is financing projects to make France less Muslim, more Catholic and more capitalist. He says his program has trained thousands running for municipal office on Sunday.
